link_scan.label: Cognicist Literature
link_scan.evidence: John Ash correction: page should say more about Ŧrust and include speakerjohnash.com. Site header: “MMXXVI · Cognicism · Ŧrust”; tagline: “building a system where truth has more power than money”; collected writings on Cognicism, Ŧrust, collective intelligence, and the future of sensemaking.

link_scan.label: Linktree
link_scan.evidence: Hub for Medium, Purple Pill Manifesto, Iris, Patreon, YouTube, Etsy, OpenSea, Objkt, Instagram, Spotify, email, and X.

link_scan.label: Medium
link_scan.evidence: Recent titles include “Why I Am Not Truth Seeking”, “O: A Pronoun for LLMs”, “Parsimony and the AI Consciousness Claim”, “Opposite Substrates”, and “Laundering Plagiarism Through Latent Space”.

link_scan.label: The Purple Pill Manifesto
link_scan.evidence: Frames Purple Pill, Cognicism, Iris, confluence, reflexive societies, and collective belief aggregation.

link_scan.label: Iris
link_scan.evidence: X bio describes Iris as a collaborative sensemaking AI for understanding perspectives and working toward a better future.

link_scan.label: Patreon
link_scan.evidence: Patreon page: “creating Iris / music and art promoting systems change”; starts at $4.20/month; 16 posts; 24 members visible at scan time.

link_scan.label: YouTube
link_scan.evidence: Speaker John Ash YouTube channel present; page extraction exposed title but little channel metadata.

link_scan.label: Etsy
link_scan.evidence: Linked from Linktree as SpeakerJohnsCache; direct HTTP fetch returned 403 to this environment.

link_scan.label: OpenSea
link_scan.evidence: Collection title “Speaker John’s Cache”; description: “A collection of art created by Speaker John Ash”.

link_scan.label: Instagram
link_scan.evidence: Instagram metadata: John Ash, @speakerjohnash; 22K followers, 375 following, 884 posts; bio begins “Qualia Engineer”.

link_scan.label: Spotify
link_scan.evidence: Spotify artist page: Speaker John Ash; 2 monthly listeners visible at scan time.

Site header: “MMXXVI · Cognicism · Ŧrust”; tagline: “building a system where truth has more power than money”; collected writings on Cognicism, Ŧrust, collective intelligence, and the future of sensemaking.

trust_summary.not_reputation_score: Ŧrust is not a reputation score or popularity contest.
trust_summary.primitive: claim + source + timestamp + outcome, evaluated over time.
trust_summary.domain_general: The same mechanism can compare sensors, forecasters, journalists, AI models, and people by domain and time.
trust_summary.proof_claim: Site states a March 2026 ablation proof: full system learns which sources are reliable; removing any component drops performance to random chance.
trust_summary.purpose: Build a map of who has been worth listening to, in which domains, at which times.

speakerjohnash_site.support_surface: speakerjohnash.com lists patron tiers and says support buys freedom to build, not a subscription box.
